description_long: This bird has a streamlined body with a smooth, slightly rounded head and a slender, pointed beak. Its plumage is primarily a muted brownish-gray with subtle gradients and some lighter underparts, blending into slightly darker tones along the wings and tail. The wings are compact and held close to the body, while the tail is long, straight, and tapers to a subtle point. The legs are short and not prominently visible, but appear to be a pale, muted color. The overall feather pattern is soft and uniform, lacking bold markings or strong contrasts. The bird's form and coloration suggest it is adapted for blending into urban or park environments.
description: A slender, brownish-gray bird with a pointed beak, smooth plumage, and a long, straight tail. Its subtle coloration and streamlined body give it a discreet, natural appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, pointed beak, and long, straight tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow head, pointed beak, and the symmetry of the wings and tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the smooth body and tail profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tapered tail and the subtle gradient of the back feathers.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid and gradient brownish-gray with lighter underparts and subtle shading on wings and tail
